patient_explanation: The heart appears larger than normal on the scan. A doctor may compare this with symptoms and other tests.
This means the scan found an area that looks different from normal tissue. It does not always mean cancer.
This means there is a break or crack in the bone.

definition: Extra fluid in a body space
patient_explanation: This means fluid has collected where it is not usually expected.

definition: Infection or inflammation in the lungs
patient_explanation: This means there may be infection or inflammation in the lung area.

definition: Partial collapse of part of the lung
patient_explanation: This means a small part of the lung may not be fully inflated.

definition: A small rounded growth or spot
patient_explanation: This means a small spot was seen on the scan. It may need follow-up depending on its size and appearance.
This means there is extra fluid causing swelling in the tissue.
